revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[en:Hakodate Hachimangū]][[ja:函館八幡宮]][[mr:हाकोदाते हाचिमन तीर्थ]][[pl:Hakodate Hachiman-gū]] {{Short description|Shinto shrine in Hakodate, Hokkaido, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{Nihongo|'''Hakodate Hachiman Shrine'''|函館八幡宮|Hakodate Hachimangū}} | image = Hakodate Hachiman Shrine.jpg | caption = Hakodate Hachiman Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41.7539|140.7101|type:landmark_region:JP|format=dms|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = [[Ōmononushi]]
([[Konpira Gongen]]) | founded_by = | established = 1445 | date_destroyed = | location = [[:en:Hakodate, Hokkaido|Hakodate, Hokkaido]], Japan | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} '''Hakodate Hachiman Shrine''' (函館八幡宮, ''Hakodate Hachimangū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[:en:Hakodate, Hokkaido|Hakodate, Hokkaido]]. It is a [[Hachiman shrine|Hachiman Shrine]], dedicated to the [[kami]] [[Hachiman]]. It is also a [[Sōja shrine|Sōja shrine]] that enshrines all the deities of its region, although it technically does not have a province. It was established in 1445. Its main festival is held annually on August 15. Kami enshrined here include {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}} as Hondawake no mikoto (品陀和気命), [[:en:Sumiyoshi no Okami|Sumiyoshi no Okami]] (住吉大神), and [[:en:Kotohira no Okami|Kotohira no Okami]] (金刀比羅大神). It was formerly a National Shrine of the Second Rank (国幣中社, ''[[:en:Kokuhei-chūsha|Kokuhei-chūsha]]'') in the [[modern system of Ranked Shinto Shrines]]. ==See also== *[[Hachiman shrine|Hachiman Shrine]] ==External links== *[http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/02/02001.html Data page] From Hokkaido Jinjacho {{Shinto-stub}} {{Hachiman Faith}} {{Kotohira Faith}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{Sōja shrines}} [[en:Hakodate Hachimangū]] {{Commons category|Hakodate Hachimangū}} [[ja:函館八幡宮]] [[mr:हाकोदाते हाचिमन तीर्थ]] [[pl:Hakodate Hachiman-gū]] {{wikidata link|Q11395952}} [[Category:1445 establishments in Asia]] [[Category:15th-century establishments in Japan]] [[Category:15th-century Shinto shrines]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Kokuhei Chūsha]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:Religious buildings and structures in Hakodate]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Sōja shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
